blockedAssertions.blockedBy: GitHub Actions shows successful `build-ios` jobs on runs 24753819737 (head `7e86221`) and 24754326012 (head `c931605`), but the current local branch is ahead of `origin/mission/biometric-vault` by 5 commits, including build-affecting fix commit `08a6b24` that modified `ios/EnboxMobile.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj` and `RCTNativeBiometricVault.mm`. Because no `ci.yml` run exists after those fixes landed and this task forbids dispatching a new workflow, the current milestone state cannot be confirmed for VAL-NATIVE-013.

GitHub Actions run 24754326012 proves `build-android` succeeded for remote head `c931605` and uploaded artifact `android-debug-apk` containing `app-debug.apk`, but the current local branch is ahead of origin by 5 commits, including build-affecting fix commit `08a6b24` that modified `android/app/src/main/java/org/enbox/mobile/nativemodules/NativeBiometricVaultModule.kt`. With no existing `ci.yml` run for the post-fix commits and no permission to dispatch one, the current milestone state remains unverified for VAL-NATIVE-021.

appliedUpdates.description: Added a native-biometric-vault-local flow-validator guidance section covering read-only GH inspection, no local native builds, and single-concurrency local validation.
Documented that build-only GitHub Actions assertions must compare a successful run head SHA with the local branch tip; if local HEAD is ahead of origin, existing green runs are not authoritative.
